name: toast
description: A transient overlay notification rendered server-side from a flash / notification: severity drives both colour and the ARIA live role (danger/warning are assertive role=alert, info/success are polite role=status) plus a leading Lucide icon. The auto-dismiss timer + dismiss button are a CSP-clean typed-TS enhancer (no wire round-trip: a shown toast needs no server decision). Server-first PARTIAL + enhancer (ADR-0012); replaces the <lv-toast> Lit island.
docs: Copies the toast partial to your JTE root at lievit/toast.jte (reached as @template.lievit.toast(variant=..., content=@`...`)) and the CSP-clean enhancer to your alias root at lievit/toast.enhancer.ts. Render the partial from the server's flash / notification (e.g. @if(flash != null) @template.lievit.toast(variant = flash.level(), content = @`${flash.message()}`) @endif) so 'open' is simply 'rendered'. Import the enhancer once from your entry module and call enhanceAllToasts() on load (and after any DOM swap): it starts the auto-dismiss timer (data-toast-duration) and wires the dismiss button. The source is yours: edit freely.
